title: Dekton Jumbo Double Sided Organizer- Organizer Box With 32 Compartments| Removable Separators For Extra Space| Dimensions: 320mm X 270mm X 60mm| Portable & Stackable Design
features: 32 Compartments for Ultimate Organization: The Dekton Jumbo Double-Sided Organizer features 32 individual compartments, allowing you to sort and store a wide variety of small items such as screws, nails, beads, and craft supplies. With this level of organization, you can easily find what you need without the hassle of rummaging through clutter.

Removable Separators for Customizable Space: Adapt the organizer to fit your needs with the removable separators. These adjustable dividers allow you to create compartments of various sizes, providing flexibility for different types of items and maximizing the use of available space. Customize your organizer to suit your specific storage requirements.

Dimensions: 320mm x 270mm x 60mm: The organizer’s dimensions make it a versatile storage solution that fits neatly on shelves, in drawers, or on workbenches. Measuring 320mm x 270mm x 60mm, it provides ample space for organizing your tools, craft supplies, or small parts while remaining compact enough for easy storage.

Portable & Stackable Design: Designed with portability in mind, the Dekton Jumbo Organizer features a lightweight construction and secure lid to keep contents in place during transport. Its stackable design allows you to save space by stacking multiple organizers on top of each other, making it ideal for both home and professional use.

Durable and Transparent Construction: Crafted from high-quality, durable materials, this organizer is built to withstand daily use and resist wear and tear. The transparent lid allows for quick visibility of contents without the need to open the box, ensuring you can easily locate items at a glance.
description: The Dekton Jumbo Double-Sided Organizer is the ultimate solution for efficient and versatile storage, offering a practical and organized way to keep your tools, crafts, or small parts neatly arranged. This robust organizer box features 32 compartments, providing ample space to categorize and store a variety of items, from screws and nails to beads and small hardware. The double-sided design maximizes functionality, allowing you to access your items from both sides for quick and easy retrieval. Each compartment is designed with removable separators, giving you the flexibility to adjust the internal layout and create custom-sized sections according to your specific needs. This feature is particularly useful for accommodating items of different sizes and shapes, ensuring that everything has its place and minimizing clutter. Measuring 320mm x 270mm x 60mm, the organizer box offers a compact yet spacious solution for your storage requirements. Its portable design allows for easy transport, making it ideal for on-the-go projects or storing in different locations. The stackable feature adds convenience, enabling you to stack multiple organizers on top of each other to save space and keep your workspace tidy. Whether you're a DIY enthusiast, a professional tradesperson, or simply need a reliable storage solution for your craft supplies, the Dekton Jumbo Double-Sided Organizer is designed to meet your needs with durability and style.
